metadata.title: SYNGO_CC_681
metadata.comment:
Rationale: * GFP-Triad3A colocalized with clathrin-DsRed in dendritic shafts and spines of hippocam- pal neurons (Figure 6A) but not with the postsynaptic density marker Homer-DsRed (Figure 6B).
* Endogenous Triad3A in dendritic spines tightly overlapped with clathrin- DsRed within a subdomain of the spine (Figure 6C)
* Immunogold electron microscopy (EM) of rat CA1 hippocampus in vivo shows Triad3A immunogold labeling near the membrane and on vesicle-like structures in both presynaptic terminals and postsynaptic spines (Figure 6E).
* (>30%) of gold particles were positioned along the plasma membrane near the PSD. Experimental description: Supp info: Hippocampal neurons were isolated from E18 rat embryos and cultured as previously described (Ehlers, 2000)

checks.label: OWL Consistency
checks.error_message: No inferences attributed to this model graph in the materializer output. Likely a parse failure or other materializer skip — re-run on this model alone to investigate.
